subject: Gaming
title: Cyberpunk 2077: The Broken Launch
description: A quick, practical guide to Cyberpunk 2077: The Broken Launch.

hook.text: Cyberpunk 2077 was the most anticipated game of 2020. It launched so broken that Sony removed it from its store.

buildup.text: CD Projekt Red spent 8 years marketing perfection. Keanu Reeves starred. Pre-orders were massive.

discovery.text: On PS4 and Xbox One, the game was nearly unplayable. Frame rates dropped below 15fps. Crashes were constant.

twist.text: CD Projekt Red's stock price crashed 75%. Investors sued. The company that made The Witcher 3 lost its reputation.

climax.text: After years of patches, the game recovered critically. But the launch destroyed trust in pre-order culture.

punchline.text: Eight years of hype. A broken launch. Trust takes longer to rebuild.

quiz.question: What unprecedented action did Sony take regarding Cyberpunk 2077?
options: They removed it from the PlayStation Store due to its broken state
They gave it a Game of the Year award
They made it free for all PlayStation users
